title: Village Revolution
description: this is a mod that enriches the village gameplay in Minecraft
body:
# 1. Description
This is a Minecraft mod that enriches the original village gameplay. Players can trade to obtain emeralds and other precious materials. With these resources, they can craft a series of emerald tools, more useful puppets, and wands to enhance themselves. Additionally, the mod introduces a powerful boss for players to challenge once they have acquired the mod's powerful equipment.

The mod also includes hidden creatures for mob battles: these are enhanced versions of regular mobs, summonable only via commands. In future updates, combat-capable villagers may be added to assist players during raids.
# 2.Content
## 1.New Golems
These golems feature distinct unique skills.
## 2.New Boss
Before having the powerful new weapons added by the mod,you couldn't beat the boss.
## 3.New Weapons
All of these weapons have practical in-game uses.
